name: Mira Circle Pool Deck Plan - 16x23 Pool Deck for 15' Round Pools | DIY PDF Plans
open_features: Designed specifically for 15' diameter round above-ground pools
Spacious 16x23 wrap-around decking with room for seating and relaxation
Optimized deck width for comfortable walking and poolside lounging
Built-in railing layout for enhanced safety and clean aesthetics
Compact yet open design - ideal for smaller and mid-size backyards
Easy-to-follow DIY PDF plans with complete material cut list & step-by-step building guide
Pool Fit: 15' diameter round above-ground pools (pool not included)
description_summary:
The Mira Circle Pool Deck Plan transforms your 15-foot above-ground pool into a beautiful backyard retreat. Featuring a 16x23 wrap-around deck layout, this design provides safe access, smooth circulation, and generous lounging space while maintaining a clean, modern footprint. Perfect for families and entertainers alike, Mira blends safety, comfort, and resort-inspired outdoor living into one elegant pool deck solution. Key Features
